assets.alt: Flat liquid-glass comparison lens over two service cards on a lavender mesh background
assets.notes: Generated with Codex image generation and saved to the owned post asset directory.
assets.final_prompt: Use case: stylized-concept. Asset type: wide blog hero. Source context from article: The article compares Virio with other LinkedIn content agency categories by fit, not by a fake ranking. The central idea is choosing the right operating model for the buyer's job: AI-assisted content service, founder voice, advocacy, or managed follow-up. Primary request: Create one simple visual metaphor inferred from the article source context: a single flat liquid-glass comparison lens resting over two abstract service cards. Use one or two relevant elements only. Do not show a comparison table, decision dashboard, provider grid, many category icons, or workflow map. Style reference: Use the Sell In Public Flat Liquid Mesh Hero style: generated raster PNG, softly blended mesh gradient background using lavender as the main color plus a close periwinkle complement, matte translucent liquid-glass shapes, simple head-on flat UI, consistent white outline weight, clean negative space, and subtle grain. Composition: Wide landscape hero near 1600x700. Place one central flat glass subject with quiet space around it. Keep the graphic readable as a single concept, not an infographic or screenshot. Scene/backdrop: Soft lavender and pale periwinkle mesh gradient only. Blend colors smoothly without hard edges. Avoid multi-color mesh palettes. Subject: One simple comparison lens over two abstract service cards, with a small neutral check mark outside the cards. Markings must be abstract and non-readable: short white lines and simple shapes only. Present the graphic completely flat and head-on, with no angled or isometric view. Detail density: Low. Simple, spacious, and specific. Avoid decorative filler. Constraints: Generated raster PNG style only. No readable text, logos, watermarks, brand names, exact LinkedIn UI, fake metrics, scattered nodes, random lines, icon clouds, fake dashboards full of metrics, overcomplicated UIs, comparison tables, provider grids, generic LinkedIn-post-card default, glossy 3D objects, glow, bloom, flares, light trails, shiny/specular/reflection cues, bokeh/orbs, hard gradient edges, SVG/vector look, photoreal stock-photo look, more than two background colors, angled perspective, isometric view, tilted panels, or three-quarter UI view.
